_comment: Posting queue for @laylaaldorani. Each item publishes once, in order, on the next scheduled slot (Sun/Tue/Thu 20:30 Asia/Qatar). 'status' flips to 'posted' automatically after a successful publish. Add new items to the bottom; the pipeline always picks the topmost item still marked 'queued'.

posts.caption:
I'm not a strict vegan, and I'm not asking you to be. Most of the benefit comes from eating mostly plants, most of the time. Not perfection, consistency.

What's one meal this week you could make plant-forward?

#plantforward #guthealth #womenswellness #plantbasednutrition #wellnessqatar

It's here.

For years I've quietly been working on this: the Qatari dishes I grew up with, reimagined plant-based, without losing the flavor, the warmth, or the memory.

Harees. Madrouba. Thareed. Machboose. Nine of the dishes that taste like home, made with jackfruit and Gulf spices instead of meat, each with a note on why it's good for your gut.

It's called TWIST, and it's finally live.

And because the gut is where all of this begins, I made you a free 5-Day Gut Reset to go alongside it. No cost, no catch, just my thank-you for being here.

Both are waiting at aldorani.com (link in bio).

This one means a lot.

#QatariFood #PlantBased #GutHealth #Doha #PlantForward #MiddleEasternFood

Stress doesn't just live in your head. It changes how hungry you feel, what you reach for, and how your body holds onto it.

When cortisol stays high, your appetite for quick energy climbs, that's biology, not weakness.

The fix isn't more willpower. It's steadying the nervous system first.

What does stress make you reach for?

#nervoussystem #guthealth #womenswellness #stressandfood #wellnessqatar #realfood

All-or-nothing is why most changes don't stick. You go hard for a week, miss one day, feel like you failed, and quit.

Your body doesn't need perfect. It needs consistent. A few steady swaps, most days, beat a dramatic overhaul you abandon by Friday.

Start with one thing, small enough that you'll still do it next week.

What's your one thing?

#plantforward #sustainablehabits #guthealth #womenswellness #realfood #wellnessqatar
